data.title: Bitcoin Faces Bear Market As Institutional Demand Declines
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on March 9, WhaleWire founder Jacob King expressed on social media that Bitcoin has entered a bear market. King highlighted the failure of Bitcoin's strategic reserve initiative, indicating that there was never an intention to purchase any assets other than the seized Bitcoin. He noted that the narrative of institutional demand has collapsed, as evidenced by record outflows from ETFs.

King criticized Bitcoin extremists for creating illusions to attract new retail investors into the bubble, stating that their tactics have been exhausted. He warned that Bitcoin is heading into a prolonged bear market, potentially reaching unprecedented low levels. King advised current investors to sell all their assets now and consider repurchasing only after a significant drop of over 85%.

data.title: WhaleWire founder: Bitcoin is heading towards a bear market that will last for several years, and it is recommended to liquidate immediately
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News WhaleWire founder Jacob King posted on the X platform that the Bitcoin bear market has arrived. The failed launch of the Bitcoin Strategic Reserve clearly shows that there is no intention to buy any assets other than the seized Bitcoin. At the same time, the narrative of institutional demand has collapsed, as evidenced by the record outflow of funds from ETFs. All narratives have been shattered - not one left.
Bitcoin extremists rely on creating illusions to attract new retail funds into the bubble, but they have run out of tricks.
Bitcoin is heading for a bear market that will last for several years, and the decline will be as deep as lows that were previously thought to be impossible to reach. If you have an investment, I strongly recommend clearing it immediately, and if you want, you can wait until it plummets by more than 85% before considering buying it back.

data.title: Binance: Will P2P Closure Impact Its Stablecoin Supply
data.description:
Binance recently said it will stop using its P2P Cash Zone service, which allows people to transact in cryptocurrency in person via registered merchants. The company is scheduled to shut down operations on March 31. The P2P Cash Zone was introduced in 2023 for use in regions with thinning banking services and transactions in more […]
The post Binance: Will P2P Closure Impact Its Stablecoin...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/09/binance-will-p2p-closure-impact-its-stablecoin-supply/

data.title: XRP Transfers Explode Past $5 Billion In 24 Hours as Wallets Surge over 600%
data.description:
XRP traded relatively flat following a sharp rebound on Tuesday, fueled by President Trump’s proposal for a U.S. strategic crypto reserve that includes XRP.
source: https://zycrypto.com/xrp-transfers-explode-past-5-billion-in-24-hours-as-wallets-surge-over-600/
